headline: Trump says US will 'guide' stranded ships from Strait of Hormuz; Iran threatens retaliation
summary: US military launches 'Project Freedom' to escort commercial ships through the Strait of Hormuz. Iran responded by threatening to attack US forces. Two merchant ships have already transited successfully.

headline: Iran says US has responded to its latest peace proposal
summary: Iran's foreign ministry spokesperson confirmed the US response was delivered via Pakistan and is now being reviewed by Iranian officials.

headline: Ukrainian drone hits upmarket Moscow high-rise ahead of Victory Day celebrations
summary: The attack comes as the Kremlin prepares to hold a scaled-back military parade on Saturday. Russian strikes also killed 10 across Ukraine.

headline: Three dead in suspected hantavirus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
summary: WHO confirmed one case of hantavirus infection with five more suspected cases under investigation. A Dutch husband and wife, plus a German national died aboard the MV Hondius.

headline: Rudy Giuliani hospitalized in critical condition
summary: The former New York City mayor and long-time Trump champion is in critical condition according to his spokesman.

headline: Modi's BJP conquers Bengal, one of India's toughest political frontiers
summary: West Bengal's election verdict could reshape not just the state's politics, but the future trajectory of Modi's BJP party.

headline: European leaders converge on Armenia as Russia looks on
summary: Two European summits are being held in a country long considered Russia's closest ally in the region, signaling shifting geopolitical alignments.

headline: North Korean football team to make rare visit to South Korea
summary: A team of North Korean footballers will make a rare visit to South Korea later this month for a sporting event.

headline: Amsterdam bans public adverts for meat and fossil fuels
summary: Local politicians say the move is in line with the Dutch capital's environmental targets, making it one of the first cities to implement such a ban.

headline: IMF cuts global growth outlook to 3.1% due to Middle East war
summary: The International Monetary Fund reduced its growth forecast citing the Middle East conflict, warning the world was already drifting toward a more adverse scenario.
